test.note: Exit code 1 from 9 pre-existing failing test files (8 with no test suite + 1 with 2 pre-existing assertion failures). 38 files passing, 279 tests passing, 2 tests failing — matches baseline (9 files failing, 2 tests failing). New tests added by workers increased passing count from 265 to 279.

lint.note: Exit code 1 from 758 pre-existing lint errors (698 errors, 60 warnings). Verified identical count before and after mission changes via git stash comparison. No new lint errors introduced.

nonBlockingIssues.description: CSS variable names (--cyber-neon-green, --quantum-green, --accent-emerald) still reference green/emerald but contain orange HSL values. Naming debt — no functional impact.

QueueIndicator.tsx retains 4 non-exempt green hex colors (#B8C49A, #2EA866) for spinner text and progress bars. These are UI accents that should have been migrated but were missed because the verification grep only checked Tailwind class names, not hex values.

~20+ studio component files outside feature scope still use green hex accents (#2EA866, #B8C49A, #9FE8B3). These were not part of either color migration Part 1 or Part 2, suggesting a gap in migration planning.
Old LobsterIntro.tsx (124 lines) was not deleted. It is imported nowhere but remains as dead code in the repository.
Exit animation on CinematicIntro motion.div is effectively dead code — component returns null before AnimatePresence can capture it for exit animation.
Concentric ring animations animate width/height directly (triggers layout reflows) rather than transform:scale(). Minor performance concern on a 2s loading screen.

Multiple landing components still contain purple color references (#8b5cf6, purple-500, violet-500) in 6+ files. These were pre-existing and outside this feature's scope but represent incomplete color migration.
Unnecessary AnimatePresence wrapper around motion.video in VideoBackground.tsx — video is never unmounted with exit animation.

appliedUpdates.description: Added React 18 ↔ Three.js version constraints to environment.md (fiber v9+ needs React 19, pin to v8.x for React 18). Added note about @types/three not being installed.
Added pre-existing lint error baseline (758 errors, 698 errors + 60 warnings) to environment.md so future workers can compare against the baseline.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Color Scheme section: 'Color migration verification must check BOTH Tailwind class names (green-/emerald-) AND hex color values (#2EA866, #B8C49A, #10B981, #50EF12, etc.) in target files. The Tailwind grep alone misses hex-based green accents used extensively in studio components.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: color-migration-studio-landing review: QueueIndicator.tsx retains 4 non-exempt green hex colors that passed the Tailwind-only verification grep. ~20+ studio files still use green hex accents outside the migrated scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add coding convention: 'When replacing a component (e.g., LobsterIntro → CinematicIntro), delete the old component file if it is no longer imported anywhere. Leaving dead components accumulates unused code.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cinematic-intro-animation review: LobsterIntro.tsx (124 lines) was fully replaced but not deleted. Worker interpreted 'Replace LobsterIntro import in Landing.tsx' literally without deleting the source file.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Color Scheme section: 'Note: CSS custom property names (--cyber-neon-green, --quantum-green, --accent-emerald) in index.css still reference green/emerald but contain orange values. This naming debt exists and should be addressed in a future cleanup pass.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: color-migration-core review: src/index.css lines 166, 237, 303 and light-premium.css line 36 have misleading variable names.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document export convention for new components: Prefer named exports (export function ComponentName) for consistency with shadcn/ui patterns. Avoid dual export (both named and default) unless needed for React.lazy().
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: landing-page-redesign review: VideoBackground uses named export, HeroSection uses default, Landing.tsx mixes import styles. No documented convention exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Frontend-worker skill: Add exception to 'write tests first' step: 'Skip test-first for purely visual/CSS-class-only changes (color migrations, layout adjustments) where there is no new logic to test. Still write tests if new components or behavioral logic are added.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both color-migration-core and landing-page-redesign workers noted in skillFeedback that test-first is not meaningful for pure CSS replacements or visual layout redesigns. This was flagged independently by two separate workers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Frontend-worker skill: Clarify that 'return to orchestrator when dependencies needed' guidance doesn't apply to features whose explicit purpose is dependency installation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: install-deps-move-assets worker noted the ambiguity in skillFeedback.

rejectedObservations.observation: Git repository root is at the user's home directory rather than the project directory, causing inflated diffs
rejectedObservations.reason: Environmental artifact specific to this machine. Not actionable by workers or the mission. Would need manual git repo re-initialization which is out of scope.

rejectedObservations.observation: WebGL testing limitation in headless Chromium
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in .factory/library/user-testing.md under Known Limitations. Duplicate observation.
